Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

Class PrimitiveIntegerVerifierNoOp<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectVerifierNoOp<S,T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractComparableVerifierNoOp<S,T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractNumberVerifierNoOp<PrimitiveIntegerVerifier<T>,T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.PrimitiveIntegerVerifierNoOp<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of the integer number
All Implemented Interfaces:
ExtensibleComparableVerifier<PrimitiveIntegerVerifier<T>,T>, ExtensibleIntegerVerifier<PrimitiveIntegerVerifier<T>,T>, ExtensibleNumberVerifier<PrimitiveIntegerVerifier<T>,T>, ExtensibleObjectVerifier<PrimitiveIntegerVerifier<T>,T>, ExtensiblePrimitiveVerifier<PrimitiveIntegerVerifier<T>,T>, PrimitiveIntegerVerifier<T>
public final class PrimitiveIntegerVerifierNoOp<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>> extends AbstractNumberVerifierNoOp<PrimitiveIntegerVerifier<T>,T> implements PrimitiveIntegerVerifier<T>
A PrimitiveIntegerVerifier that does nothing.
